title: MANGA NGE Quick question
wikitext:
[]: [NGE] Quick question             Quote Post by Fainne Roisin » Sun Sep 25, 2005 7:43 pm Because I'm not entirely clear on this: Did this manga come out before or after the anime series? And if it came out after, wasn't there a manga that appeared (I think in Shonen Jump?) before the anime?

[]:             Quote Post by sachiel » Sun Sep 25, 2005 7:45 pm After. The manga was done by Yoshiyuki Sadamoto. It was his take on the anime. The anime was directed/created by Hideaki Anno.

[]: Re: Quick question             Quote Post by TsubasaNoKoikokoro » Sun Sep 25, 2005 7:54 pm Fainne Roisin wrote: Because I'm not entirely clear on this: Did this manga come out before or after the anime series? And if it came out after, wasn't there a manga that appeared (I think in Shonen Jump?) before the anime?

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Sun Sep 25, 2005 7:55 pm Actually, while the bulk of the manga has been put forth long after the debut of the series, the first few stages actually came on the scene before the series premiered.

[]:             Quote Post by TsubasaNoKoikokoro » Sun Sep 25, 2005 8:08 pm Yes, but the series was still "un-publically" released at that time.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Sep 25, 2005 8:13 pm Tsu-chan wrote: Yes, but the series was still "un-publically" released at that time.

[]:             Quote Post by Fainne Roisin » Sun Sep 25, 2005 8:53 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Tsu-chan wrote: Yes, but the series was still "un-publically" released at that time.

[]:             Quote Post by TsubasaNoKoikokoro » Mon Sep 26, 2005 6:53 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Tsu-chan wrote: Yes, but the series was still "un-publically" released at that time.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Sep 26, 2005 8:12 am Tsu-chan wrote: Yes but since Sadamoto was involved in Eva he probally knew about the plot of the first episodes before Anno publically released them.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Mon Sep 26, 2005 12:28 pm Everyone is stating this in too confusing a manner. To boil it all down: even though the Manga started publishing before the Anime started airing, the Manga is based on the Anime. The opposite is true for most shows. The early episodes don't resemble the early Manga stages because Anno was copying Sadamoto. It's because Sadamoto had script access.

[]:             Quote Post by lyricaldanichan » Fri Oct 21, 2005 12:31 am thewayneiac wrote: Everyone is stating this in too confusing a manner. To boil it all down: even though the Manga started publishing before the Anime started airing, the Manga is based on the Anime. The opposite is true for most shows. The early episodes don't resemble the early Manga stages because Anno was copying Sadamoto. It's because Sadamoto had script access.

[]:             Quote Post by sachiel » Sun Sep 25, 2005 7:45 pm After. The
